mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_logs ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_logs WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_logs ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_logs WHERE 1=1
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND log_level = #{logLevel}
AND (log_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR request_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR method_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
